title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Closing Supported devices list
scenario: Verify that when no device is connected, the "Supported Devices" link on the home screen displays a list of supported devices with images and an "Other devices" button linking to Poly support, and that the back arrow returns the user to the home screen.
steps: Observe the home screen for the 'Supported Devices' link.
Observe the list of supported devices with images.
Locate the 'Other devices' button and verify it links to Poly support.
Observe that the user is returned to the home screen.
expected: The user can see the "Supported Devices" link on the home screen, click it to view a list of supported devices with images and an "Other devices" button linking to Poly support, and return to the home screen by clicking the back arrow.
